response:
the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit that is awakened through the grace of the guru and the path of devotion - the language of the soul is found in the sacred word - gene of truth is passed on through the lineage of the truthful - visit the path of the truthful and find the light within - the soul is cleansed when it merges with the divine - the true master is the one who gives the divine word - the spirit is guided by the guru's grace - the language of the heart is the language of the divine - the gene of devotion is passed from one generation to another - visit the temple of the divine and feel the presence of the holy - the spirit is uplifted through the sacred teachings - the language of the scriptures is the language of the soul - the gene of the true path is found in the teachings of the guru - visit the path of truth and find the divine within - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the language of the heart is the language of the divine - the gene of the true path is found in the teachings of the guru - visit the path of truth and find the divine within  

***  

the true devotee is one who serves the guru with devotion and finds the light within - the spirit is guided by the divine word - the language of the soul is the language of the divine - the gene of truth is passed on through the lineage of the truthful - visit the path of the truthful and find the light within - the soul is cleansed when it merges with the divine - the true master is the one who gives the divine word - the spirit is uplifted through the sacred teachings - the language of the heart is the language of the divine - the gene of the true path is found in the teachings of the guru - visit the path of truth and find the divine within - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the language of the heart is the language of the divine - the gene of the true path is found in the teachings of the guru - visit the path of truth and find the divine within
